mapper.select:
select * from task_fields tf
AND tf.task_type_id = #{taskTypeId}

WITH RECURSIVE -- 第一步：向上找根节点 find_root AS ( SELECT id, parent_id FROM task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = '0' UNION ALL SELECT t.id, t.parent_id FROM task t INNER JOIN find_root fr ON t.id = fr.parent_id WHERE t.is_deleted = '0' ), root_node AS ( SELECT id AS root_id FROM find_root WHERE parent_id = 0 OR parent_id IS NULL LIMIT 1 ), -- 第二步：从根向下构建完整树 task_tree AS ( SELECT t.id, t.task_title, t.task_type_id, t.project_id, t.description, t.priority, t.assigner, t.parent_id, t.assignee, t.estimated_hours, t.status, t.start_time, t.due_date, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.update_time, t.update_by, t.is_deleted, 0 AS level, CAST(t.id AS CHAR(200)) AS path FROM task t CROSS JOIN root_node r WHERE t.id = r.root_id AND t.is_deleted = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT t.id, t.task_title, t.task_type_id, t.project_id, t.description, t.priority, t.assigner, t.parent_id, t.assignee, t.estimated_hours, t.status, t.start_time, t.due_date, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.update_time, t.update_by, t.is_deleted, tt.level + 1 AS level, CONCAT(tt.path, ',', t.id) AS path FROM task t INNER JOIN task_tree tt ON t.parent_id = tt.id WHERE t.is_deleted = '0' ) -- 第三步：返回结果，并标记目标节点 SELECT id, task_title, task_type_id, project_id, description, priority, assigner, parent_id, assignee, estimated_hours, status, start_time, due_date, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, is_deleted, level, path, CASE WHEN id = #{taskId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_target FROM task_tree ORDER BY path

SELECT t.id, t.task_title, t.task_type_id, t.project_id, t.description, t.priority, t.assigner, t.assignee, t.estimated_hours, t.status, t.start_time, t.due_date, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.update_time, t.update_by FROM task t INNER JOIN task_relation r ON t.id = r.child_task_id WHERE r.parent_task_id = #{parentId} AND r.is_deleted = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.id, t.task_title, t.task_type_id, t.project_id, t.description, t.priority, t.assigner, t.assignee, t.estimated_hours, t.status, t.start_time, t.due_date, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.update_time, t.update_by FROM task t INNER JOIN task_relation r ON t.id = r.parent_task_id WHERE r.child_task_id = #{childId} AND r.is_deleted = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, tt.name AS taskTypeName, COALESCE( (SELECT JSON_OBJECTAGG( tf.name, JSON_OBJECT( 'value', IFNULL(fv.value, ''), 'label', COALESCE(tf.label, ''), 'isRequired', COALESCE(tf.is_required, 0), 'isHidden', COALESCE(tf.is_hidden, 1), 'options', COALESCE( CASE WHEN tf.options IS NOT NULL AND tf.options != '' AND JSON_VALID(tf.options) THEN CAST(tf.options AS JSON) ELSE JSON_ARRAY() END, JSON_ARRAY() ), 'type', COALESCE(tf.type, ''), 'configOverride', COALESCE(tf.config_override, JSON_OBJECT()) ) ) FROM task_fields tf LEFT JOIN task_field_values fv ON fv.tasks_id = t.id AND fv.field_id = tf.id WHERE tf.task_type_id = t.task_type_id AND tf.name IS NOT NULL AND tf.name != '' ), JSON_OBJECT() ) AS dynamicFields FROM task t INNER JOIN task_type tt ON t.task_type_id = tt.id WHERE t.is_deleted = '0' AND t.id = #{tasksId}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedTasks, COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgressTasks FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_deleted = '0'

SELECT status as status, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_deleted = '0'), 2) as percent FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_deleted = '0' GROUP BY status
SELECT priority as level, COUNT(*) as count FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_deleted = '0' GROUP BY priority

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedTasks, COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgressTasks FROM task WHERE is_deleted = '0'
AND project_id IN
#{projectId}
AND 1 = 0

WITH status_list AS ( SELECT 1 as status_id UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ), task_data AS ( SELECT status, COUNT(*) as status_count FROM task WHERE is_deleted = '0'
AND project_id IN
#{projectId}
AND 1 = 0
GROUP BY status ) SELECT sl.status_id as status, COALESCE(td.status_count, 0) as count, ROUND( COALESCE(td.status_count, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(( SELECT SUM(status_count) FROM task_data ), 0), 2 ) as percent FROM status_list sl LEFT JOIN task_data td ON sl.status_id = td.status ORDER BY sl.status_id

SELECT t.level as level, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN task.priority = t.level THEN 1 END), 0) as count FROM ( SELECT 1 as level UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 ) t LEFT JOIN task ON task.priority = t.level AND task.is_deleted = '0'
AND task.project_id IN
#{projectId}
AND 1 = 0
GROUP BY t.level ORDER BY t.level

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedTasks, COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgressTasks FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_deleted = '0'

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedTasks, COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgressTasks FROM task WHERE is_deleted = '0'
AND project_id IN
#{projectId}
AND 1 = 0
and (assigner = #{userId} or assignee = #{userId})
